title: Synthetic HIV bipartite prevalence, illustrative generalized epidemic with TasP rollout
generating_model: bipartite (M-F) SI model with treatment-as-prevention compartment and time-varying treatment coverage
noise_model: log-normal multiplicative noise with sigma=0.05 (survey-based prevalence estimates)
purpose: Used by Chapter 17 notebooks to demonstrate HIV bipartite calibration, treatment-as-prevention impact, and geographic-comparison structure.
